value.body:
## Cleanup candidate

`packages/desktop/src/renderer/lib/ticketTypes.ts` duplicates ticket type ids, labels, canonical checks, and legacy alias normalization that already exist in `@cycle/contracts`.

## Evidence

- Desktop local definitions: `packages/desktop/src/renderer/lib/ticketTypes.ts`
  - `TicketTypeId` union duplicates canonical ids.
  - `canonicalTicketTypes` duplicates display labels/descriptions.
  - `isCanonicalTicketType` duplicates canonical validation.
  - `normalizeCreateTicketType` duplicates `initiative -> epic` and `issue -> task` alias handling.
- Canonical source: `packages/contracts/src/schemas/components/TicketTypeId.ts`
  - `CanonicalTicketTypeIds`
  - `TicketTypeRegistry`
  - `LegacyTicketTypeAliases`
  - `isCanonicalTicketTypeId`
  - `normalizeTicketTypeForRead`
  - `validateTicketTypeForWrite`

## Suggested approach

Drive renderer authoring options and normalization from `TicketTypeRegistry` / `CanonicalTicketTypeIds`, adding only UI-specific metadata such as the `auto` option locally. If descriptions are product copy, consider moving them to the canonical registry or deriving labels from `displayLabel`.

## Acceptance criteria

- The renderer no longer hardcodes the canonical ticket type id union or duplicated canonical list.
- Legacy alias handling is imported from the canonical contract helper or otherwise derived from canonical aliases.
- Create-issue and template-default behavior stays the same.

frontmatter.title: Replace renderer ticket type duplication with canonical contract registry

value.title: Replace renderer ticket type duplication with canonical contract registry
